title: Plugin Manifest for Grammar Definition
description: Schema for plugin manifests of type 'grammar_definition' for TauTranslatorOmega.

id.description: Unique identifier for the plugin, reverse domain name notation recommended (e.g., com.example.my_grammar).

version.description: Version of the plugin (e.g., 0.1.0). Should follow semantic versioning.

description.description: A brief description of the plugin and the grammar it provides.

author.description: Author or organization responsible for the plugin.

ilr_versions_supported.description: List of TauTranslatorOmega ILR versions this plugin is compatible with.

grammar_details.description: Details specific to the grammar provided by this plugin.

grammar_file.description: Path to the main grammar definition file, relative to the plugin's root directory (e.g., 'grammar/my_tau_lang.g4' or 'grammar/my_tau_lang.lark').

entry_rule.description: Optional: The name of the main or starting rule in the grammar that represents a complete Tau compilation unit. If not provided, a default might be assumed or it might be formalism-dependent.

antlr_version.description: Required if formalism is 'antlr4'. Specifies the ANTLR version the grammar targets (e.g., '4.9', '4.13').

transformer_class.description: Optional: Fully qualified name of the Python class that transforms the CST to AST (e.g., 'my_plugin.transformer.MyTransformer'). Primarily used with Lark.

ilr_version.description: The ILR version this grammar definition targets or produces (e.g., '1.0.0'). Should follow semantic versioning.
